name: swipebin
description: Tinder-style file culling app — swipe to keep or delete any file (images, RAW, PDFs, and more).

scripts.dev:server: IMAGES_DIR="$(pwd)/photos" APP_DIR="$(pwd)/data" npm run dev --workspace server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace web && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace web
